notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, shortstop Konnor Griffin to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Gunnar Henderson out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill lines out sharply to shortstop Konnor Griffin.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Orioles challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: pitcher Isaac Mattson picks off Coby Mayo at 1st on throw to first baseman Spencer Horwitz.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill flies out to right fielder Ryan O'Hearn.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Anthony Nunez. Nick Yorke scores. Nick Gonzales to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Anthony Nunez. Nick Yorke scores. Nick Gonzales to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Nick Yorke doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Dylan Beavers. Bryan Reynolds scores. Ryan O'Hearn to 3rd.
